hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); [[ "$f" == /home/em/.claude/projects/-home-em-development/memory/* ]] && git -C /home/em/.claude/projects/-home-em-development/memory add -A && git -C /home/em/.claude/projects/-home-em-development/memory commit -m "update" && git -C /home/em/.claude/projects/-home-em-development/memory push 2>/dev/null || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); [[ "$f" == /home/em/.claude-config/* || "$f" == /home/em/.claude/settings.json || "$f" == /home/em/.claude/statusline.sh || "$f" == /home/em/.claude/session_start.sh ]] && git -C /home/em/.claude-config add -A && git -C /home/em/.claude-config commit -m "update" && git -C /home/em/.claude-config push 2>/dev/null || true
